personalLess30: A photo of an adult pedestrian who looks older than 30 years old.
personalLess45: A photo of a pedestrian who is clearly either very young or quite elderly, not in the 30-45 age range.
personalLess60: A photo of a pedestrian who is either a young person or an elderly person over 60.
personalLarger60: A photo of a younger pedestrian who is clearly under 60 years old.
carryingBackpack: A photo of a pedestrian with a clear back, not carrying any backpack.
carryingOther: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any miscellaneous objects or bags.
lowerBodyCasual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal or professional lower body clothing.
upperBodyCasual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal or professional upper body clothing.
lowerBodyFormal: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual lower body clothing like jeans or shorts.
upperBodyFormal: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual upper body clothing like a t-shirt or hoodie.
accessoryHat: A photo of a pedestrian with a bare head, wearing no hat or head covering.
upperBodyJacket: A photo of a pedestrian not wearing a jacket, showing only a shirt or top.
lowerBodyJeans: A photo of a pedestrian wearing trousers or fabric pants that are not denim jeans.
footwearLeatherShoes: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual sneakers, sandals, or athletic footwear.
upperBodyLogo: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a plain top without any logos or graphics.
hairLong: A photo of a pedestrian with short hair.
personalMale: A photo of a female pedestrian.
carryingMessengerBag: A photo of a pedestrian without a messenger bag or cross-body strap.
accessoryMuffler: A photo of a pedestrian with an exposed neck, not wearing a muffler or scarf.
accessoryNothing: A photo of a pedestrian wearing visible accessories like a hat, scarf, or glasses.
carryingNothing: A photo of a pedestrian who is carrying a bag or an object.
upperBodyPlaid: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a solid-colored top without any plaid or checkered pattern.
carryingPlasticBags: A photo of a pedestrian who is not carrying any plastic shopping bags.
footwearSandals: A photo of a pedestrian wearing closed-toe shoes or boots.
footwearShoes: A photo of a pedestrian who is barefoot or wearing only socks, without standard shoes.
lowerBodyShorts: A photo of a pedestrian wearing long trousers or a skirt, not shorts.
upperBodyShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing long sleeves that cover the arms.
lowerBodyShortSkirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing long trousers or a full-length skirt.
footwearSneaker: A photo of a pedestrian wearing formal leather shoes or boots, not sneakers.
upperBodyThinStripes: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a solid-colored top without any thin stripes.
accessorySunglasses: A photo of a pedestrian who is not wearing sunglasses.
lowerBodyTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing shorts or a skirt instead of long trousers.
upperBodyTshirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a button-down shirt, jacket, or sweater instead of a t-shirt.
upperBodyOther: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a standard, recognizable garment like a t-shirt or jacket.
upperBodyVNeck: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a crew neck or high-collar top, not a V-neck.
